mapper.select: SELECT a.chnl_id, a.chnl_nm, a.track_id, a.track_nm, a.album_id, f.artist_id repArtistId, f.artist_nm repArtistNm, a.track_sn, a.agency_id, if(a.streaming_premium_yn = 'Y' OR a.pps_yn = 'Y', 'Y', 'N') holdbackYn, a.create_dtime, a.update_dtime, d.artist_id, d.artist_nm, b.album_img_size size, CONCAT(b.album_img_url, '?updateDate=', unix_timestamp(b.update_dtime)) url, a.trackCreateDtime, a.trackUpdateDtime FROM ( SELECT a.chnl_id, a.chnl_nm, c.track_id , c.track_nm, c.album_id, c.reprsnt_artist_id, b.track_sn, c.agency_id, c.streaming_premium_yn, c.pps_yn, a.create_dtime, a.update_dtime, c.create_dtime trackCreateDtime, c.update_dtime trackUpdateDtime FROM tb_chnl a INNER JOIN tb_map_chnl_track b ON a.chnl_id = b.chnl_id INNER JOIN tb_track c ON b.track_id = c.track_id WHERE a.chnl_id = #{chnlId} AND a.disp_status_type ='Y' AND c.disp_status_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY b.track_sn LIMIT 0 , 10 ) a LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_album_img b ON a.album_id = b.album_id LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_trackartist as c ON a.track_id = c.track_id AND c.rp_yn = 'Y' and c.db_sts = 'A' LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_artist d ON c.artist_id = d.artist_id LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_album e ON a.album_id = e.album_id LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_artist f ON a.reprsnt_artist_id = f.artist_id

SELECT count(*) FROM tb_chnl a INNER JOIN tb_map_chnl_track b ON a.chnl_id = b.chnl_id INNER JOIN tb_track c ON b.track_id = c.track_id WHERE a.chnl_id = #{chnlId} AND a.disp_status_type ='Y' AND c.disp_status_yn = 'Y'

SELECT chnl_id FROM (SELECT a.chnl_id, a.chnl_nm, a.create_dtime, a.update_dtime, c.category_id, d.category_nm, d.category_type, b.disp_sn FROM tb_chnl a INNER JOIN (SELECT b.music_content_id, b.disp_sn FROM tb_chart a INNER JOIN tb_chart_music_content b ON a.chart_id = b.chart_id INNER JOIN tb_img_mang c ON b.music_content_id = c.img_content_id WHERE a.chart_type = 'WEEKLY' AND a.svc_content_type = 'ALL' AND a.music_content_type = 'CHNL' AND c.dfk_type = 'EVERY' AND c.img_content_type='CHNL') b ON a.chnl_id = b.music_content_id INNER JOIN tb_map_category_chnl c ON b.music_content_id = c.chnl_id INNER JOIN tb_category d ON c.category_id = d.category_id WHERE a.disp_status_type = 'Y' GROUP BY a.chnl_id ORDER BY b.disp_sn) a WHERE category_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY category_id ORDER BY disp_sn
